<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This project uses Next.js (TypeScript) with Material-UI (MUI) and @chenglou/pretext for advanced text flow. Use idiomatic React and MUI patterns. All UI should be accessible and responsive. Use Pretext for text flow around images where possible.
